## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / entity

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff format .` and `ruff check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes; new/changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if any device endpoint/behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, device IPs, or credentials committed
